repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Mon Cochran papers

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Cornell Early Childhood Program

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Swedish Practicum in Childhood, Family, and Social Policy

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Reports, Printed Materials, Research Materials
did.abstract: Correspondence, grant files, project files, and videos pertaining to Cochran's career and his work.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of Human Development, Cornell University.
Mon Cochran received a B.A. from Harvard (1964) and M.A.(1969) and Ph.D. (1973) degrees from the University of Michigan. He directed the Cornell Early Childhood Program and retired in 2008.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, grant files, project files, and videos pertaining to Cochran's career and his work with child care and prekindergarten programs, the Cornell Early Childhood Program, the Swedish Practicum in Childhood, Family, and Social Policy Program, and the Family Matters Project.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Mon Cochran papers, #23-13-3720. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
